product_name: The name of the product that was updated. In this case, it would be 'tofu'.
update_month_year: The month and year when the product update was rolled out. In this case, it would be 'July 2025'.
store_name: The name of the store where the product update took place. In this case, it would be a store under 'Lee’s Market'.
reason_for_delay: The reason why there was a delay in the product update rollout. In this case, it would be 'double-checking packaging colors and labels'.
number_of_stores_affected: The number of stores that were affected by the delay in the product update rollout. In this case, it would be '12'.
